metadata.description: Specialized workflows for AI coding agents — structured expertise for tasks that benefit from a repeatable, opinionated process.

plugins.name: train
plugins.description: Multi-faceted training coach with five modes (quiz, flashcard, teach-back, scenario, practice) plus adaptive difficulty, browser UI, and cross-session progression tracking

plugins.name: git-squash
plugins.description: Squashes a git branch into fewer, more meaningful commits with well-structured messages

plugins.name: skill-forge
plugins.description: Creates publishable agent skills with proper plugin structure, READMEs, and eval-backed quality

plugins.name: scaffold
plugins.description: Scaffolds a full-stack JS/TS project — picks technologies for each layer, runs the CLI, and wires up all the boilerplate

plugins.name: user-journey
plugins.description: Generate Playwright E2E test specs for user journeys — login flows, checkout funnels, onboarding wizards, or any multi-step browser interaction

plugins.name: ml-architect
plugins.description: Structured interactive workflow for designing and producing runnable ML pipelines — problem definition, data strategy, model selection, training, evaluation, and deployment with cascading invalidation

plugins.name: agent-forge
plugins.description: Create specialized TypeScript agents by composing AI SDK, Chat SDK, MCP tools, and sandboxes — interactive wizard that scaffolds standalone agent projects with the right interface, tools, and model configuration

plugins.name: demo-creator
plugins.description: Create narrated demo videos of any project from its codebase using Remotion and ElevenLabs TTS — reads the code, writes a script, generates voiceover, and produces a complete video project

plugins.name: image-gen
plugins.description: Generate images using Nano Banana 2 via the Gemini API — text-to-image, image editing with a reference photo or URL, auto/interactive modes

plugins.name: tracer-bullet
plugins.description: Ship thinnest possible end-to-end working code for a feature or new project — one happy path, real I/O, no gold-plating. Interviews I/O and constraints, proactively recommends design patterns / algorithms / data structures, writes working code, verifies it runs. Explicit slash-command only.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Implements Andrej Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern — bootstrap, maintain, and query a persistent, interlinked markdown knowledge base that compounds across sessions. Handles init (schema + structure), ingest (file new sources into entity/concept pages with cross-references), query (synthesize from wiki pages, file valuable answers back), and lint (find contradictions, stale claims, orphans).

plugins.name: extension-forge
plugins.description: Build and launch a complete Chrome (Manifest V3) extension — scaffolds a @crxjs + React + TypeScript extension (or wraps an existing one), audits permissions against actual code use and prunes the unused, generates Chrome Web Store paperwork (per-permission privacy policy, reviewer justifications, listing copy), renders a reproducible Remotion-in-Docker demo video plus all store marketing assets at exact dimensions (icons, 1280x800 screenshots, 1400x560 marquee, 440x280 promo tile, 1280x720 thumbnail), and wires a badged README with test/release GitHub Actions that release on version bump + passing tests. Use for 'create a chrome extension', 'publish to the chrome web store', 'make an extension with a demo video', 'package my extension', or 'ship my extension'.
